name: Editorial
description: Digital print magazine aesthetic. High-contrast, dramatic typography, zero decoration. Content is the design. Ink-on-paper warmth with modern sensibility.
personality: sharp + flat elevation + instant motion + no borders + no gradients

decorators.editorial-card: Clean white card with thin hairline border, generous whitespace, and elegant serif typography framing.
decorators.editorial-pullquote: Large italic serif text with bold left accent border in secondary red, generous vertical margins.
decorators.editorial-divider: Thin single-pixel line separator with generous vertical spacing to create breathing room between sections.
decorators.editorial-caption: Small uppercase tracking-wide text in muted color for image captions and metadata labels.
decorators.editorial-dropcap: Oversized initial letter spanning three lines in bold serif weight to open article sections.
